answers: Laser cutting uses focused laser beam to cut or engrave materials. Clean, precise cuts in wood, acrylic, leather, paper.
Types: CO2 (wood, acrylic, leather), fiber (metals), diode (engraving). CO2 is most versatile for hobbyists.
Materials: wood, acrylic, leather, paper, cardboard, fabric. Avoid PVC (toxic fumes) and polycarbonate (catches fire).
Start: design in Inkscape (free) or Illustrator, export as SVG, import to laser software, set power/speed, and cut.
